question:
Will Brazil take second place in Miss Universe 2025?

Description: The Miss Universe 2025 competition is scheduled to be held in Thailand on November 21, 2025. You can find more information about that here: https://www.missuniverse.com/the-competition-thailand/

This market will resolve according to the listed country represented by the contestant named first runner-up in this competition. 

If the result of this competition isn't known by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on official results as reported by the Miss Universe Organization.

Description: The Miss Universe 2025 competition is scheduled to be held in Thailand on November 21, 2025. You can find more information about that here: https://www.missuniverse.com/the-competition-thailand/

evidences.content: ## The timeline of the key events at Miss Universe 2025 While the coronation night may still be two weeks away, the competition is already in full swing. Delegates have flown in from all corners of the world to spend three weeks in the Land of Smiles, taking part in press events, fashion showcases, and other events that lead up to the final show. Here’s an outline of their key events. Sunday, 2 November: Candidates from 122 countries arrive in Bangkok Wednesday, 5 November: Official press conference and Sashing ceremony Saturday, 8 November: Welcome Gala in Phuket Friday, 14 November: ‘Swimsuit Fashion Show’ in Pattaya Saturday, 15 November: Closed-door interviews Wednesday, 19 November: Preliminary competition and ‘National Costume Competition’ in Bangkok [...] Prestige Online – Singapore Style Your guide to Miss Universe 2025 in Thailand: Schedule, highlights, and the controversy Share : Next article Contestants have walked out. evidences.content: All contestants from Latin America have been confirmed and are already in Thailand, ready to compete for the Miss Universe 2025 crown. The grand finale of the 74th Miss Universe pageant will take place at Impact Arena in Pak Kret, Thailand, on November 21. Here’s a look at all the Latina contenders. ## Meet the Latina Delegates Heading to Miss Universe 2025 The confirmed Latina representatives vying to become the next Miss Universe - and succeed Victoria Kjær - hail from Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Cuba, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Puerto Rico, the Dominican Republic, Uruguay, and Venezuela. [...] In addition, this year the region will feature one more Latina contestant, selected through Telemundo’s reality show Miss Universe Latina. evidences.title: Miss Universe 2025 candidates walk out on Thai exec Nawat Itsaragrisil – Asia News Network
evidences.content: November 5, 2025 BANGKOK – On the third day of the Miss Universe 2025 pageant, the tension within the organization further escalated after controversial exec Nawat Itsaragrisil called out the candidate from Mexico that prompted her walkout while sympathetic candidates followed suit. The seeming power struggle in the Miss Universe Organization (MUO), particularly between its president, Mexican Raul Rocha, and Nawat further escalated and have apparently began to affect the delegates who are caught in the middle. Nawat, who has acquired the Miss Universe Thailand franchise, is the head of the host country’s organizing committee tasked to promote the pageant and mount the coronation night scheduled on November 21. [...] The tension between Nawat and MUO was further fueled when Rocha sent his own makeup team to Bangkok even as the Thai committee had already chosen a makeup sponsor to handle the requirements of the entire competition season. Nawat also called the Thai Police to seize materials bearing the name and logo of a Filipino online gaming platform, which the MUO brought in as the pageant’s “official journey partner.” Casinos are illegal in Thailand. Theilvig is set to relinqui...

evidences.title: Miss Universe 2025 Candidates Walk Out After Director ...
evidences.content: Afterwards, the Miss Universe Organization released an official statement, in which it reaffirmed its commitment to respect, safety, and collaboration, but did not name Nawat Itsaragrisil or reference the confrontation. The statement said that “All scheduled events and activities will continue as planned, reaffirming our shared goal of delivering an exceptional celebration that reflects the values of diversity, empowerment, and inclusion that define the Miss Universe legacy. Related ### Who is Nawat Itsaragrisil, the Miss Thailand Director Who Insulted Miss Mexico? 2025 Miss Universe Miss Mexico miss universe [...] Other delegates seen walking out include Miss Armenia, Miss Canada, Miss Palestine, Miss Bahamas, Miss Cape Verde, Miss Spain, Miss Belize, Miss Bolivia, and Miss Bulgaria. Related ### Miss Universe President Raúl Rocha Calls Out Miss Thailand Director After Controversy Bosch spoke to the media afterwards, saying, “I really love Thailand, I respect everyone, I think they are amazing people. But what the director just did was disrespectful; he called me ‘dumb’ because he has issues with the organization.” The current Miss Universe also spoke in support of Bosch. [...]...
